alternatives.name: Solar-EPC extending into BESS
alternatives.tradeoffs: One PV+BESS contract; thinner storage-only R&D; smaller DE BESS install base than pure-plays

alternatives.name: Pure-play BESS integrator
alternatives.tradeoffs: Deep BESS muscle; civil/MV usually subbed; separate warranty stream when retrofit onto PV

alternatives.name: OEM turnkey bundle
alternatives.tradeoffs: Tight hardware/software coupling; OEM lock-in; limited DE civil/MV depth

alternatives.name: Owner-led split-contract
alternatives.tradeoffs: Lowest equipment cost; highest interface risk; cascading delays; no single warranty

alternatives.name: Defer / no storage
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero P1 burden; forgoes EPEX arbitrage, FCR/aFRR, §19 StromNEV; may strand §8a EEG overbuild slot
